IDENTITY SYSTEM — _build_identity_context() added to ChatEngine. Reads ethica_name and user_name from config fresh on every message. Injected at all 3 system prompt assembly points (lines 257, 710, 1079). sidebar.py on_name_save callback added — triggers engine.reset() and posts acknowledgment to chat. Architecture always 'Ethica', persona name fully user-configurable.

INTEGRITY MODAL TEXT — startup_check() warning sharpened with memory-loss language: tool call patterns, preferences, accumulated memory at risk. If you did not make these changes your environment may be compromised.

J.A.R.V.I.S. BUG BOUNTY EXPANSION — _get_jarvis_model() with WhiteRabbitNeo easter egg (preference chain: whiterabbitneo > codellama > mistral > deepseek-coder > primary). _llm_query() one-shot Ollama call. jarvis_analyze — CVE + LLM attack vector analysis. jarvis_recon — HTTP fingerprint + nmap + LLM attack surface analysis. 7 tools total in manifest.
CHAT_ENGINE TRIGGERS — jarvis analyze and jarvis recon wired at lines 423-424 and 637.

GIT CORRUPTION PURGED — All corrupt loose objects and corrupt pack files deleted. Multiple orphan resets performed. Working tree clean.
GITHUB PUBLIC PUSH — https://github.com/Trinity963/Ethica live. 656 objects. 5.56 MiB. Clean.

entry_point_minitrini.objective: Port Ethica's Integrity Shield pattern into MiniTrini v10.1
what_to_build: guard_seal() — SHA-256 hash all MiniTrini architecture files into a manifest (equivalent to Ethica's .vault/ETHICA_INTEGRITY.json)
guard_heal() — restore tampered/missing files from a known-good vault backup
startup_check() — boot-time integrity verification, warn if mismatch
mid-session hook — check integrity after significant operations
first_commands: grep -rn 'guard\|integrity\|hash\|seal' ~/MiniTrini/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v .pyc | head -20 — check if any guard exists already
entry_point_minitrini.reference: Use ~/Ethica/modules/ethica_guard/ethica_guard.py as the template. Adapt paths, scope, and manifest location to MiniTrini's directory structure.
surgical_reminders: Confirm MiniTrini venv path before touching anything
Never cd into MiniTrini — use full paths

trinitygateNote: TrinityGate — loopback Docker egress gateway — lives inside TrinityBrowseSe. Full stack: TrinityGate → VPN → TrinityBrowseSe → personal Ethica → MiniTrini. Personal Ethica will have full bug bounty tools, J.A.R.V.I.S. fully armed, MiniTrini wired.
lesson_learned_052: Unicode box-drawing characters in comments break string match — always use line-index insertion. Corrupt git pack files survive orphan resets — must delete pack files explicitly before the second orphan. Module zip assets committed to git become corrupt loose objects that block push — add assets/*.zip to gitignore from day one. queue.Queue is the correct pattern for Tkinter thread-safety — root.after(0) from a daemon thread is unreliable on some Linux Tkinter builds.

critical_debug_context.integrity_manifest: .vault/ETHICA_INTEGRITY.json — 157 files. NOTE: .vault/ now in .gitignore — never commits.
critical_debug_context.jarvis_model_chain: whiterabbitneo > codellama > mistral > deepseek-coder > primary model
critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — git -C ~/Ethica for all git ops
critical_debug_context.unicode_patch_rule: Files with box-drawing chars — use line-index insertion, not string match
critical_debug_context.tkinter_thread_rule: Never call Tkinter from daemon thread — use queue.Queue + root.after() drain pattern
critical_debug_context.git_corruption_rule: Before orphan reset: delete all pack files in .git/objects/pack/ first
